quotes.text: Before enlightenment, chop wood, carry water. After enlightenment, chop wood, carry water.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: The obstacle is the path.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: When you reach the top of the mountain, keep climbing.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: Sitting quietly, doing nothing, spring comes, and the grass grows by itself.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: When walking, walk. When eating, eat.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: Let go, or be dragged.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: The only Zen you find on tops of mountains is the Zen you bring there.
quotes.author: Robert M. Pirsig

quotes.text: Do not seek the truth — only cease to cherish opinions.
quotes.author: Seng-ts'an

quotes.text: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities, in the expert's mind there are few.
quotes.author: Shunryu Suzuki

quotes.text: The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
quotes.author: Ram Dass

quotes.text: No snowflake ever falls in the wrong place.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: To a mind that is still, the whole universe surrenders.
quotes.author: Chuang Tzu

quotes.text: If you understand, things are just as they are. If you do not understand, things are just as they are.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: When you realize nothing is lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Muddy water is best cleared by leaving it alone.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: The flower does not think of competing with the flower next to it. It just blooms.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: Be master of mind rather than mastered by mind.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: What the caterpillar calls the end, the rest of the world calls a butterfly.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Knowing others is intelligence; knowing yourself is true wisdom. Mastering others is strength; mastering yourself is true power.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: We are what we think. All that we are arises with our thoughts. With our thoughts, we make the world.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Those who know do not speak. Those who speak do not know.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: If you are depressed, you are living in the past. If you are anxious, you are living in the future. If you are at peace, you are living in the present.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Move and the way will open.
quotes.author: Zen Proverb

quotes.text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: You cannot travel the path until you have become the path itself.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Wherever you are, be there totally.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle
